sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40289" key="e)pinauphge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιναυπηγέω</orth>, <sense id="n40289.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">build upon the ship</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:92" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.92</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Pass</placeName>). </sense><sense n="II" id="n40289.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense">. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">build</tr_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in addition</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καινὰς τριήρεις</foreign> Anon.Argent.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:p.75" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.75</biblScope> </bibl> Keil.</sense> </entryFree>
